raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Refactor MQTT connection setup to use MqttConnectOptions and convert password to char array to comply with API requirements.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.general_idea: Refactor MQTT connection setup to use MqttConnectOptions and convert password to char array to comply with updated Paho client API requirements.
